title: user login functionality
description: Test the user login API endpoint /accounts/login/ with valid and invalid credentials to verify successful authentication and proper error handling.

title: student registration process
description: Verify the student registration API /accounts/register/student/ by submitting valid and invalid data, ensuring correct creation of student accounts with program and group associations.

title: association registration and approval workflow
description: Test the association registration endpoint /accounts/register/association/ for successful registration and validate the admin approval workflow for activating association accounts.

title: bulk room creation functionality
description: Validate the bulk room creation API /rooms/bulk-create/ by submitting room prefix and numeric ranges, ensuring correct creation of multiple rooms with specified attributes.

title: room reservation request and approval
description: Test the room reservation creation endpoint /schedule/reservations/create/ for submitting valid reservation requests and the approval endpoint /schedule/reservations/{id}/approval/ for admin approval or rejection workflows.

title: session creation and management
description: Verify the session creation API /schedule/sessions/create/ by creating various session types (cours, td, tp) with valid data and checking for conflict validations.

title: weekly timetable view by user role
description: Test the timetable view endpoint /schedule/timetable/ to ensure it returns the correct weekly timetable data filtered by the authenticated user's role.

title: notification api endpoints
description: Validate the notification APIs including unread count /api/notifications/unread-count/, recent notifications /api/notifications/recent/, marking single notification as read /api/notifications/{id}/mark-read/, and marking all as read /api/notifications/mark-all-read/ for correct data and state changes.

title: contact form submission
description: Test the contact form submission endpoint /contact/ with valid and invalid inputs to ensure messages are stored and admin notifications are triggered.

title: teacher unavailability management
description: Verify the teacher unavailability APIs /schedule/unavailability/ and /schedule/unavailability/create/ for listing and creating unavailability periods, ensuring they are considered in scheduling conflicts.
